transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Alex calling from Bright Smile Dental. Am I speaking with Maria?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, this is Maria.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, Maria! I'm calling because you recently filled out a form on our website about scheduling a new patient appointment. Is that something you're still interested in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Oh yes, I've been meaning to get in for a cleaning and checkup. It's been a while.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful! We'd love to get you in. Before I check our schedule, do you have dental insurance by any chance?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, I have Delta Dental through my employer.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect — we're in-network with Delta Dental, so your new patient exam and cleaning should be fully or mostly covered. I have openings this Thursday at 2pm or next Tuesday at 10am. Which works better for you?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Thursday at 2 works great actually.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent! I've got you booked for Thursday at 2pm. You'll receive a text confirmation shortly with our address. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you so much!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're very welcome, Maria. We look forward to seeing you Thursday. Have a wonderful day!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental. Could I speak with David Chen?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi David! I'm following up on your appointment inquiry. We'd love to get you scheduled for a new patient visit. Is now a good time?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sure, yeah. I've been putting this off for a bit too long honestly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ha, you're definitely not alone there. Do you currently have dental insurance?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I do — MetLife.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great news, we accept MetLife. For new patients your exam and X-rays are typically covered. Do you have any specific concerns I should note for the dentist, or is this more of a general checkup?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Just a general checkup and cleaning. Maybe a quick look at one tooth that's been slightly sensitive on the right side.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely, I'll note that for the dentist. I have Wednesday at 9am or Friday at 3pm available. Which do you prefer?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Friday at 3 would work well.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful, David! You're all set for Friday at 3pm. A confirmation text is on its way. We'll make sure to take a look at that sensitive tooth too.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Perfect, thanks a lot.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Our pleasure! See you Friday. Have a great rest of your day!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Sarah Williams?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, that's me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Sarah, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental. I'm calling about your appointment inquiry. Are you still interested in coming in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Possibly, yeah. How much does a new patient appointment cost?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The new patient exam and X-rays are $150.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Hmm, that's a bit more than I was expecting. I'm not really in a position for that right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. The exam is $150.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, I'll have to pass for now. Maybe another time.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem at all. Have a good day.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental. Am I speaking with Kevin Park?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Kevin! I'm reaching out about your new patient appointment inquiry. Are you still looking to schedule?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I was, but I wanted to know the cost upfront before committing to anything.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, the new patient exam with X-rays is $150.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That seems pretty expensive honestly. I've seen other places that are much cheaper.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. We do offer comprehensive care.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I'm just not sure it's worth it right now. Do you have any sort of discount?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We don't currently have a discount promotion, no.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay, I think I'll hold off then.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Alright, no problem. Feel free to call us if you change your mind.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning! Is this Priya Nair?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Priya, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental calling about your appointment inquiry. Still interested in scheduling?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Definitely. I've been wanting to get my teeth properly cleaned. Honestly I'd love for them to look a bit brighter too if possible.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great! Do you have dental insurance?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, BlueCross BlueShield.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, we accept that. I have Thursday at 11am or Friday at 2pm available. Which works for you?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Thursday at 11 works.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set for Thursday at 11am! A confirmation text is coming your way shortly.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Great, thank you!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Priya! See you Thursday!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental. Is this Tom Rivera?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great! I'm calling about your appointment inquiry. I have openings Monday at 1pm or Wednesday at 4pm. Which would you prefer?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Uh, Monday works I guess. Do you take my insurance?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: What insurance do you have?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Cigna.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes we do accept Cigna. So Monday at 1pm works?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, sure.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful, you're booked for Monday at 1pm. See you then!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental calling for Lisa Thompson. Is that you?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, hi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Lisa! I'm calling about your appointment inquiry. Are you still looking to schedule a visit?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: How much does it cost? I don't have insurance right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Without insurance the new patient exam and X-rays would be $150.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Oh, that's too much for me right now. Sorry.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, may I speak with James O'Brien?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: This is him. Who's calling?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi James, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental following up on your appointment inquiry.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Look, you've called me three times already. I said I'd call you when I was ready.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I apologize for that, James. I just wanted to make sure you had a chance to get scheduled. Are you interested in coming in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Not if you're going to keep pestering me, no.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I completely understand. I'll make a note not to follow up again. If you ever decide you'd like to schedule, our number is on the website.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Fine. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Anna Peterson?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes it is, hi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Anna! This is Alex from Bright Smile Dental. I'm calling about your new patient appointment inquiry. Is now a good time?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, perfect timing actually. I've been anxious about going to the dentist but I know I need to go.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I completely understand that feeling, and I want you to know our team is very gentle with anxious patients. We'll make sure you're comfortable the whole time. Do you have dental insurance?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, I have Aetna.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, Aetna is fully accepted. Your new patient exam should be covered. I have Tuesday at 3pm or Thursday morning at 9am — our Thursday doctor is particularly known for being great with anxious patients if that would help.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Oh, Thursday morning at 9 sounds great then.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thursday at 9am it is! You'll get a confirmation text shortly. And please don't hesitate to call us beforehand with any questions — we want you to feel totally at ease.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That's really reassuring, thank you so much.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely! We'll see you Thursday, Anna. Have a wonderful day!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Alex from Bright Smile Dental. Is this Rachel Kim?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Rachel! I'm calling about your dental appointment inquiry. Still interested in scheduling?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Potentially. What's the cost for a new patient without insurance?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Without insurance it's $150 for the full new patient exam and X-rays.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That's pretty steep. Does that go down if I don't need the X-rays?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We do recommend X-rays for all new patients, but I understand the budget concern. Some insurances will cover a portion even for out-of-network — do you have any insurance at all?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: No, I'm between jobs right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see. Unfortunately I can't go lower than the standard rate.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay, I'll have to wait until I get back on my feet. Thanks though.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, Rachel. We'll be here when you're ready. Take care!
